description: Comprehensive visualization showing absence of all intein catalytic blocks in Rv0311 with AlphaFold pLDDT profile
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive visualization of the intein motif analysis

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 12), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [2, 2, 1.5]})

# Panel 1: Sequence map with intein catalytic site positions
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_title('Rv0311 (O07238) Intein Catalytic Block Analysis', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

sequence = ""

# Draw the protein as a bar
ax1.barh(0, len(sequence), height=0.4, color='#E8E8E8', edgecolor='gray')

# Mark His residues
his_positions = [i+1 for i, aa in enumerate(sequence) if aa == 'H']
for pos in his_positions:
    ax1.plot(pos, 0, 'v', color='blue', markersize=8, alpha=0.7)

# Mark Cys residues
cys_positions = [i+1 for i, aa in enumerate(sequence) if aa == 'C']
for pos in cys_positions:
    ax1.plot(pos, 0, '^', color='red', markersize=8, alpha=0.7)

# Mark expected intein positions with X
# Position 1: N-terminal Cys/Ser (ABSENT - has Met)
ax1.annotate('Block A\n(Cys/Ser)\n✗ Met', xy=(1, 0.3), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.plot(1, 0.25, 'x', color='red', markersize=15, markeredgewidth=3)

# C-terminal: penultimate His + terminal Asn (ABSENT)
ax1.annotate('Block G\n(His,Asn)\n✗ Val,Lys', xy=(408, 0.3), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.plot(408, 0.25, 'x', color='red', markersize=15, markeredgewidth=3)

# Block B: TXXH motif (ABSENT)
ax1.annotate('Block B\n(TXXH)\n✗ absent', xy=(70, -0.35), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.plot(70, -0.25, 'x', color='red', markersize=15, markeredgewidth=3)

# Block F: DxxHxxG (ABSENT)
ax1.annotate('Block F\n(DxxHxxG)\n✗ absent', xy=(200, -0.35), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.plot(200, -0.25, 'x', color='red', markersize=15, markeredgewidth=3)

# Add LAGLIDADG note
ax1.annotate('LAGLIDADG\n✗ absent', xy=(300, -0.35), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.plot(300, -0.25, 'x', color='red', markersize=15, markeredgewidth=3)

# HxxH motif found
ax1.annotate('HxxH\n(pos 108-111)', xy=(110, -0.35), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='green', fontweight='bold')
ax1.plot(110, -0.25, 'o', color='green', markersize=10, markeredgewidth=2, fillstyle='none')

ax1.set_xlim(0, 420)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.6, 0.6)
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Position')
ax1.set_yticks([])

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='red', label='Missing intein catalytic residue (✗)'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='v', color='blue', label='His residues', linestyle='None', markersize=8),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='^', color='red', label='Cys residues', linestyle='None', markersize=8),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='o', color='green', label='Non-intein motif', linestyle='None', markersize=8, fillstyle='none'),
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='upper right', fontsize=8)

# Panel 2: pLDDT confidence plot
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('AlphaFold pLDDT Confidence Profile', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Re-derive pLDDT scores
import requests
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-O07238-F1-model_v6.pdb"
pdb_resp = requests.get(pdb_url, timeout=60)
pdb_content = pdb_resp.text

plddt_data = []
for line in pdb_content.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        try:
            residue_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
            bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
            plddt_data.append((residue_num, bfactor))
        except:
            pass

positions = [d[0] for d in plddt_data]
scores = [d[1] for d in plddt_data]

# Color by confidence level
colors = []
for s in scores:
    if s > 90: colors.append('#0053D6')
    elif s > 70: colors.append('#65CBF3')
    elif s > 50: colors.append('#FFDB13')
    else: colors.append('#FF7D45')

ax2.bar(positions, scores, color=colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')
ax2.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high (>90)')
ax2.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5, label='Confident (>70)')
ax2.set_ylim(50, 100)
ax2.set_xlim(0, 420)
ax2.set_ylabel('pLDDT Score')
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue Position')
ax2.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# Panel 3: Intein checklist table
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('Intein Catalytic Block Checklist', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

table_data = [
    ['Block A: N-terminal Cys/Ser', 'Position 1 = Met', '✗ ABSENT', 'Essential for N-S acyl shift'],
    ['Block B: TXXH motif', 'Not found anywhere', '✗ ABSENT', 'Catalyzes N-terminal cleavage'],
    ['Block F: DxxHxxG', 'Not found', '✗ ABSENT', 'Homing endonuclease (if present)'],
    ['Block G: penultimate His', 'Position -2 = Val', '✗ ABSENT', 'C-terminal cleavage catalyst'],
    ['Block G: terminal Asn', 'Position -1 = Lys', '✗ ABSENT', 'Asn cyclization for splicing'],
]

col_labels = ['Required Feature', 'Found in Rv0311', 'Status', 'Function']
table = ax3.table(cellText=table_data, colLabels=col_labels, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

# Color the status column
for i in range(len(table_data)):
    table[(i+1, 2)].set_facecolor('#FFE0E0')
    table[(i+1, 2)].set_text_props(color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Color header
for j in range(4):
    table[(0, j)].set_facecolor('#4472C4')
    table[(0, j)].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('intein_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: intein_analysis.png")
